name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's totally okay — no pressure, no guilt trip. Life gets busy, and dental care shouldn't feel like one more thing weighing on you.

If you ever do want to come back, here's a little welcome-back gift — 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

Good for the next 14 days. Just mention it (or enter it at checkout) when you book a cleaning or consultation.

And if there was something about your last experience that didn't feel right, I'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. We read every message, and we're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary for everyone who walks through our door.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}} — quick note from Bright Smile Dental. Your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is still good for a few more days if you'd like to come back for a cleaning. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
